lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਕਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਊਚਾ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: taa kaa ant na paaeeai aoochaa agam apaar jeeo |
lines.english: His limits cannot be found; He is lofty and exalted, inaccessible and infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਣਾ ਰਹਿ ਗਏ ਮਨਿ ਵੁਠਾ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੁ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: aavan jaanaa reh ge man vutthaa nirankaar jeeo |
lines.english: My comings and goings have ended; the Formless Lord now dwells within my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਅਪਣਾ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਸੋ ਮਰਿ ਜੰਮੈ ਲਖ ਵਾਰ ਜੀਉ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: jis prabh apanaa visarai so mar jamai lakh vaar jeeo |6|
lines.english: One who forgets His God, shall die and be reincarnated, hundreds of thousands of times. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੁ ਨੇਹੁ ਤਿਨ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮਾ ਜਿਨ ਮਨਿ ਵੁਠਾ ਆਪਿ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: saach nehu tin preetamaa jin man vutthaa aap jeeo |
lines.english: They alone bear true love for their God, within whose minds He Himself dwells.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਗਿ ਰਤੇ ਪਰਮੇਸਰੈ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਸਗਲ ਸੰਤਾਪ ਜੀਉ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: rang rate paramesarai binase sagal santaap jeeo |7|
lines.english: They are attuned to the Love of the Transcendent Lord; all their sorrows and afflictions are dispelled. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਸਾਝੀ ਤਿਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਬਸੇ ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜਾਪਿ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: gun saajhee tin sang base aatth pehar prabh jaap jeeo |
lines.english: So dwell only with those who share their virtues; chant and meditate on God, twenty-four hours a day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਸਮਰਥੁ ਤੂ ਸਰਬ ਮੈ ਤੂਹੈ ਬੁਧਿ ਬਿਬੇਕ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: too samarath too sarab mai toohai budh bibek jeeo |
lines.english: You are All-powerful, You are present everywhere; You are the subtle intellect, the clear wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਕਰਤਾ ਤੂੰ ਕਰਣਹਾਰੁ ਤੂਹੈ ਏਕੁ ਅਨੇਕ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: toon karataa toon karanahaar toohai ek anek jeeo |
lines.english: You are the Creator, You are the Cause of causes; You are the One and the many.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਦਾ ਜਪੀ ਭਗਤ ਜਨਾ ਕੀ ਟੇਕ ਜੀਉ ॥੮॥੧॥੩॥
lines.translit: naanak naam sadaa japee bhagat janaa kee ttek jeeo |8|1|3|
lines.english: Nanak chants and meditates forever on the Naam, the Support of the humble devotees. ||8||1||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਅਸਟਪਦੀਆ ਘਰੁ ੧੦ ਕਾਫੀ ॥
lines.translit: raag soohee mahalaa 5 asattapadeea ghar 10 kaafee |
lines.english: Raag Soohee, Fifth Mehl, Ashtpadheeyaa, Tenth House, Kaafee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਭੁਲੀ ਜੇ ਚੁਕੀ ਸਾਈਁ ਭੀ ਤਹਿੰਜੀ ਕਾਢੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: je bhulee je chukee saaee bhee tahinjee kaadteea |
lines.english: Even though I have made mistakes, and even though I have been wrong, I am still called Yours, O my Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑਾ ਨੇਹੁ ਦੂਜਾਣੇ ਲਗਾ ਝੂਰਿ ਮਰਹੁ ਸੇ ਵਾਢੀਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jinaa nehu doojaane lagaa jhoor marahu se vaadteea |1|
lines.english: Those who enshrine love for another, die regretting and repenting. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਨਾ ਛੋਡਉ ਕੰਤ ਪਾਸਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: hau naa chhoddau kant paasaraa |
lines.english: I shall never leave my Husband Lord's side.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਰੰਗੀਲਾ ਲਾਲੁ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਏਹੁ ਮਹਿੰਜਾ ਆਸਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sadaa rangeelaa laal piaaraa ehu mahinjaa aasaraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: My Beloved Lover is always and forever beautiful. He is my hope and inspiration. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਜਣੁ ਤੂਹੈ ਸੈਣੁ ਤੂ ਮੈ ਤੁਝ ਉਪਰਿ ਬਹੁ ਮਾਣੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: sajan toohai sain too mai tujh upar bahu maaneea |
lines.english: You are my Best Friend; You are my relative. I am so proud of You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਤੂ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਤਾ ਸੁਖੇ ਤੂੰ ਨਿਮਾਣੀ ਮਾਣੀਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jaa too andar taa sukhe toon nimaanee maaneea |2|
lines.english: And when You dwell within me, I am at peace. I am without honor - You are my honor. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਤੂ ਤੁਠਾ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਨਿਧਾਨ ਨਾ ਦੂਜਾ ਵੇਖਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: je too tutthaa kripaa nidhaan naa doojaa vekhaal |
lines.english: And when You are pleased with me, O treasure of mercy, then I do not see any other.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਵ ਜੁਲਾਈ ਪੰਧ ਤਉ ਨੈਣੀ ਦਰਸੁ ਦਿਖਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: paav julaaee pandh tau nainee daras dikhaal |
lines.english: Let my feet walk on Your Path, and let my eyes behold the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹਾ ਪਾਈ ਮੂ ਦਾਤੜੀ ਨਿਤ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਰਖਾ ਸਮਾਲਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ehaa paaee moo daatarree nit hiradai rakhaa samaal |3|
lines.english: Please grant me this blessing, that that I may forever dwell upon You and cherish You within my heart. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਤੀ ਲਖ ਕਰੋੜਿ ਪਿਰੀਏ ਰੋਮ ਨ ਪੁਜਨਿ ਤੇਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: kitee lakh karorr piree rom na pujan teriaa |
lines.english: Hundreds of thousands and millions do not equal even one hair of Yours, O my Beloved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸ੍ਰਵਣੀ ਸੁਣੀ ਕਹਾਣੀਆ ਜੇ ਗੁਰੁ ਥੀਵੈ ਕਿਰਪਾਲਿ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sravanee sunee kahaaneea je gur theevai kirapaal |4|
lines.english: With my ears, I will listen to Your Sermon, if the Guru becomes merciful to me. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹੀਆ ਤਊ ਅਸੰਖ ਮੰਞਹੁ ਹਭਿ ਵਧਾਣੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: saheea taoo asankh manyahu habh vadhaaneea |
lines.english: Your brides are countless; they are all greater than I am.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਸਾਹੀ ਹੂ ਸਾਹੁ ਹਉ ਕਹਿ ਨ ਸਕਾ ਗੁਣ ਤੇਰਿਆ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: too saahee hoo saahu hau keh na sakaa gun teriaa |5|
lines.english: You are the King of kings; I cannot even describe Your Glorious Praises. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੈ ਡਿਠੇ ਮਨੁ ਧੀਰੀਐ ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਵੰਞਨੑਿ ਦੂਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: jai dditthe man dheereeai kilavikh vanyana doore |
lines.english: Seeing Him, my mind is comforted and consoled, and my sins and mistakes are far removed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਿਕ ਭੋਰੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲਿ ਦੇਹਿ ਦਰਸੁ ਰੰਗੁ ਮਾਣੀਆ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: hik bhoree nadar nihaal dehi daras rang maaneea |6|
lines.english: Please bless me with Your Glance of Grace, even for an instant; please bless me with Your Darshan, that I may revel in Your Love. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਕਿਉ ਵਿਸਰੈ ਮਾਉ ਮੈ ਜੋ ਰਹਿਆ ਭਰਪੂਰੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: so kiau visarai maau mai jo rahiaa bharapoore |7|
lines.english: How could I ever forget Him, O my mother? He is permeating and pervading everywhere. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਇ ਨਿਮਾਣੀ ਢਹਿ ਪਈ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਸਹਜਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: hoe nimaanee dteh pee miliaa sehaj subhaae |
lines.english: In humility, I bowed down in surrender to Him, and He naturally met me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੂਹੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: soohee mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Soohee, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਪਾਇਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਸੰਤ ਸਹਾਇ ॥੮॥੧॥੪॥
lines.translit: poorab likhiaa paaeaa naanak sant sahaae |8|1|4|
lines.english: I have received what was pre-ordained for me, O Nanak, with the help and assistance of the Saints. ||8||1||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਬੇਦ ਪੁਰਾਣ ਪੁਕਾਰਨਿ ਪੋਥੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: simrit bed puraan pukaaran potheea |
lines.english: The Simritees, the Vedas, the Puraanas and the other holy scriptures proclaim

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨੁ ਅਪਾਰੁ ਭਗਤਾ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: naam nidhaan apaar bhagataa man vasai |
lines.english: The infinite treasure of the Naam abides within the minds of the devotees.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਸਭਿ ਕੂੜੁ ਗਾਲੑੀ ਹੋਛੀਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naam binaa sabh koorr gaalaee hochheea |1|
lines.english: that without the Naam, everything is false and worthless. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਮੋਹੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਨਸੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran mohu dukh saadhoo sang nasai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Birth and death, attachment and suffering, are erased in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਿ ਬਾਦਿ ਅਹੰਕਾਰਿ ਸਰਪਰ ਰੁੰਨਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: mohi baad ahankaar sarapar runiaa |
lines.english: Those who indulge in attachment, conflict and egotism shall surely weep and cry.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੀ ਮੇਰੀ ਧਾਰਿ ਬੰਧਨਿ ਬੰਧਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: meree meree dhaar bandhan bandhiaa |
lines.english: Crying out, Mine! Mine!, he is bound in bondage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਰਕਿ ਸੁਰਗਿ ਅਵਤਾਰ ਮਾਇਆ ਧੰਧਿਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: narak surag avataar maaeaa dhandhiaa |3|
lines.english: Entangled in Maya, he is reincarnated in heaven and hell. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਨੑਿ ਮੂਲਿ ਨਾਮ ਵਿਛੁੰਨਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sukh na paaeina mool naam vichhuniaa |2|
lines.english: Those who are separated from the Naam shall never find any peace. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਧਤ ਸੋਧਤ ਸੋਧਿ ਤਤੁ ਬੀਚਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: sodhat sodhat sodh tat beechaariaa |
lines.english: Searching, searching, searching, I have come to understand the essence of reality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਨਾਹਿ ਸਰਪਰ ਹਾਰਿਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: naam binaa sukh naeh sarapar haariaa |4|
lines.english: Without the Naam, there is no peace at all, and the mortal will surely fail. ||4||
